Catering Venue Comparison

Catering package comparison across premium venues

Venue Overview

Hedsor House

Location: Berkshire
Capacity: 100–150
Accommodation: 12 bedrooms
Packages: Darcy (£35,700–£40,500) or Florence (£71,460–£76,860)
Includes: Event manager, staff, canapés, 3-course meal, evening food, wine, linens, florals, wedding cake, uplighting, DJ, PA, dance floor
Brochure: Darcy | Florence

Froyle Park

Location: Alton, Hampshire
Capacity: 80–120
Accommodation: 32 bedrooms (66 guests)
Package: £15,000–£19,250
Includes: Canapés, 3-course meal, evening food, free corkage until 7pm, linens, glassware, menu tasting, dietary options, staffing, tea & coffee
Brochure: View

Stowe House

Location: Buckinghamshire
Capacity: 120–150
Accommodation: Multiple state rooms
Package: £35,700 (Nov only)
Includes: Sparkling wine, canapés (4 per person), 3-course meal, post-dinner tea/coffee, house wine, water, uplighting, DJ, PA system, event manager, security, menu tasting
Brochure: View

Blake Hall

Location: Ongar, Essex
Capacity: 80–150
Accommodation: Cottages on-site
Package: £17,065–£21,529 (flexible, Dec POA)
Includes: Canapés, wine, meal options from menu, evening food (pizza or slow roast), linens
Note: Menu à la carte approach offers flexibility

Cooling Castle Barn

Location: Cooling, Kent
Capacity: 80–120
Accommodation: 15 ensuite rooms
Package: £15,700–£17,800
Includes: Prosecco post-ceremony, 3-course meal, house wine, evening buffet, DJ, linens, crockery, uplighting, fairy lights, dressing rooms, duty manager, toastmaster
Note: Consistent weekday/weekend pricing

The Tudor Barn

Location: Eltham, Essex
Capacity: 120–200
Accommodation: None
Package: £25,478–£26,808 (Nov/Dec Thu only)
Includes: Unlimited fizz reception (1 hour), canapés, starters, mains, dessert, evening food, tea/coffee, unlimited evening bar (4 hours)
Brochure: View
